fab_section_md:
- Green council maester who urged parley and was dispatched as Aegon's envoy (fab-the-blacks-and-the-greens-16-p02:35)
- Confronted by Rhaenyra, he admitted King Viserys had named her heir (fab-the-blacks-and-the-greens-16-p02:49)
- Orwyle replied". Rhaenyra stripped his chain of office and had it given to Gerardys (fab-the-blacks-and-the-greens-16-p02:55)
identity_line: Grand Maester Orwyle — Green council maester who urged parley and was dispatched as Aegon's envoy.

fab_section_md: - The Sea Snake; his ships sailed from Hull and Spicetown to close the Gullet and choke King's Landing's trade (fab-the-blacks-and-the-greens-16-p02:75)
identity_line: Corlys Velaryon — The Sea Snake; his ships sailed from Hull and Spicetown to close the Gullet and choke King's Landing's trade.

fab_section_md:
- Ratcatcher of the Red Keep who knew its hidden doors and secret tunnels; he led Blood in unseen, bound Queen Alicent, and made the choice-demand of Helaena (fab-the-blacks-and-the-greens-16-p02:259)
- He escaped and was never found (fab-the-blacks-and-the-greens-16-p02:277)
identity_line: Cheese — Ratcatcher of the Red Keep who knew its hidden doors and secret tunnels; he led Blood in unseen, bound Queen Alicent, and made the choice-demand of Helaena.
